evals.prompt: Reset the admin account in this Laravel project to email: admin@82cf.com and password: test123
evals.expected_output: Successfully reset or created the admin user with the specified credentials, and verified it exists in the database

evals.prompt: Create a new admin user with email admin@test.com and password secret456 in this Laravel project
evals.expected_output: Successfully created the admin user with the specified credentials and verified it exists in the database

evals.prompt: I need to reset the admin password - the current admin email is admin@company.com and I want to set the password to MySecureP@ssw0rd!
evals.expected_output: Successfully reset the admin user password and verified the user can authenticate with the new password
